stemHtml: An aircraft followed a full de-icing and anti-icing procedure. The hold over time has not yet elapsed however, as the weather deteriorates, the commander is worried that the HOT may have reduced. What shall he/she do?

options.a: The commander may ask for a pre take-off visual check for any contaminant.
options.b: Take-off as the contaminant will be blown away.
options.c: Take-off with a lower flap setting.
